name: Ehren, Lightsworn Monk
name_jp: ライトロード・モンク エイリン
desc: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, before damage calculation: Shuffle that monster into the Deck. Once per turn, during your End Phase: Send the top 3 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard.
mnst_eff: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, before damage calculation: Shuffle that monster into the Deck. Once per turn, during your End Phase: Send the top 3 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard.
eff: If this card attacks a Defense Position monster, before damage calculation: Shuffle that monster into the Deck. Once per turn, during your End Phase: Send the top 3 cards of your Deck to the Graveyard.

sets.set: Rise of the True Dragons Structure Deck

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's Deck
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
